calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jul-03-2014 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-19-2013 Set For Trial On Jul-28-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-17-2013 Continued To Oct-02-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-28-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Nicole L. Jones, Esq. (415-438-6663) for Bay Area Properties, Ltd., Defendant and moving party / Navruz Avloni, Esq. (415-835-6777) for Sheila Harris-Young, Plaintiff and opposing party

ARGUED - Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument, tentative ruling is adopted as follows: DEFENDANT BAY AREA PROPERTIES, LTD.'s MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT is
DENIED as follows:(1) as to punitive damages - complaint sufficiently alleges facts re: "conscious disregard of the rights or safety of others." (2) as to injunctive relief - moot, in light of ruling on demurrer. Order is signed in open court. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not reported (D501)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-28-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Nicole L. Jones, Esq. (415-438-6663) for Bay Area Properties, Ltd., Defendant and moving party / Navruz Avloni, Esq. (415-835-6777) for Sheila Harris-Young, Plaintiff and opposing party

ARGUED - Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument, tentative ruling is adopted as follows: DEFENDANT BAY AREA PROPERTIES, LTD.'s DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED in part and OVERRULED in part. (1) Demurrer is SUSTAINED with leave to amend as to 9th causes of action for UCL violation for Plaintiff to allege standing.
(2) Demurrer is OVERRULED re: statute of limitations. Plaintiff sufficiently alleges that habitability issues have never been addressed and are still ongoing.
(3) Demurrer to 2nd cause of action for IIED is OVERRULED, Plaintiff sufficiently alleges all elements, including outrageous conduct and severe emotional distress.
(4) Demurrer is OVERRULED as to 5th cause of action for breach of covenant of quiet enjoyment. Complaint sufficiently alleges substantial interference with tenancy in 14.
Order is signed in open court. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not reported (D501)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-30-2013 Continued To Jun-28-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT BAY AREA PROPERTIES, LTD.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is transferred to Department 501 to June 28, 2013 at 9:30 am. Plaintiff must deliver courtesy copies of the opposition papers per Local Rule 2.6B and Defendant must deliver a courtesy copy of the operative pleading per Local Rule 2.6C to Department 501, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than May 30, 2013 at 4:00 pm. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). The court has courtesy copies of the moving and reply papers. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-30-2013 Continued To Jun-28-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
